refactoring.description: Rename Variable	daysLate : long to lateDays : long in method public calculateFee(loan Loan, member Member, today LocalDate) : double from class org.library.LateFeeCalculator
Rename Method	public helper(base double) : double renamed to public applyDiscount(base double) : double in class org.library.LateFeeCalculator
Add Parameter	cap : double in method public applyDiscount(base double, cap double) : double from class org.library.LateFeeCalculator
